reasoning: The TGA balance was highly elevated at $942.7 billion in early November 2025, well above the historical operational targets (which usually hover around $750 to $850 billion). Because there are no major tax deadlines between early November and mid-January, cash usually drains from the account during this period due to government outlays. As mean-reverting behavior is strong, the TGA is very likely to trend back toward its historical target in the coming weeks and months. The probabilities of an increase are estimated to be relatively low across all dates due to this high initial baseline, though uncertainty increases somewhat as we look further into Q1 2026.
